Title: Rule Validation Schema
Description: This schema defines the structure for validating rules written in YAML format ensuring they are ready to be transformed into ARM json format and deployed in Microsoft Sentinel.

id.description: Stable unique identifier of the rule (UUID).

kind.description: The kind of the rule, which determines the type of analytics rule to be created in Microsoft Sentinel.

apiVersion.description: The API version to be used when deploying the rule to Microsoft Sentinel.

queryFrequency.description: How often the query runs. ISO-8601 duration (e.g., PT5M, PT1H).

queryPeriod.description: The time range the query looks back on when it runs. ISO-8601 duration (e.g., PT5M, PT1H).

triggerOperator.description: The operator used to compare the query results against the trigger threshold.

triggerThreshold.description: The threshold value that determines when an alert is generated based on the query results.

suppressionDuration.description: The duration for which alerts are suppressed after an alert is triggered. ISO-8601 duration (e.g., PT5H).

suppressionEnabled.description: Indicates whether alert suppression is enabled.

startTimeUtc.description: The UTC time when the rule should start being active. ISO-8601 format (e.g., 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z).

tactics.description: MITRE ATT&CK tactics associated with the rule.
